361:         // Delete local branch. If this fails, keep the branch tracked so cleanup can be retried.
362:         if git::branch_exists(branch_name)
363:             && let Err(e) = git::delete_branch(branch_name, true)
364:         {
365:             ui::warn(&format!(
366:                 "Could not delete local branch `{branch_name}`: {e}"
367:             ));
368:             ui::info(&format!(
369:                 "Kept `{branch_name}` tracked because cleanup did not complete"
370:             ));
371:             ui::receipt(&serde_json::json!({
372:                 "cmd": "sync",

375:                 "reason": "branch_delete_failed",
376:                 "parent": parent,
377:             }));
378:             continue;
379:         }
380: 
381:         if is_managed {
382:             let parent_name = parent.clone().expect("managed branch should have a parent");
383: 
384:             // Propagate repo metadata to direct children BEFORE removing the branch,
385:             // so children don't lose their effective_pr_repo resolution chain.
386:             let direct_children = state.children_of(branch_name);
387:             let merged_pr_repo = state.effective_pr_repo(branch_name);
388:             let merged_push_remote = Some(state.effective_push_remote(branch_name));
389:             for child in &direct_children {
390:                 let child_meta = state.get_branch_mut(child)?;
391:                 if child_meta.pr_repo.is_none() {

393:                 }
394:                 if child_meta.push_remote.is_none() {
395:                     child_meta.push_remote = merged_push_remote.clone();
396:                 }
397:             }
398: 
399:             let _ = state.reparent_children_preserving_parent_head(branch_name, &parent_name)?;
400: 
401:             // Update child PR bases after reparenting (cross-fork-aware, repoint-guarded).
402:             for child in &direct_children {
403:                 let child_pr = state.get_branch(child).ok().and_then(|m| m.pr_number);
404:                 let Some(child_pr_number) = child_pr else { continue };
405:                 if !state.effective_repoint(child) {

408:                     ));

410:                 }
411:                 let child_repo = state.effective_pr_repo(child);

424:                 }
425:             }
426:
